overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a journey from a luxury rooftop penthouse, descending via elevator through a towering megabuilding, navigating a gritty underground market, and emerging into a vibrant neon-lit cyberpunk city intersection filled with holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop terrace with elevator access

events.description: approaching and entering the rooftop elevator

agents.ego_description: walking across a wooden terrace toward a modern elevator embedded in a reflective glass wall

entered.detail: dark mirrored facade reflecting the city skyline and clouds
polished wooden planks forming the rooftop flooring
modern metal elevator door with illuminated edges
glass and metal safety railing along the terrace edge
greenery in planters along the terrace perimeter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a luxury rooftop terrace with dark reflective glass walls mirroring the overcast sky. The camera approaches a modern elevator door set into the building facade, walking across polished wooden decking with metal railings visible to the side.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse lobby with red carpet and modern art

events.description: exiting elevator into luxurious indoor penthouse space
approaching and entering the second elevator to descend

agents.ego_description: walking through a spacious luxury interior with red carpet, passing reception desks and modern artwork

entered.detail: crimson carpet runner leading through the penthouse interior
dark wood and metal reception counter with decorative items
large circular artwork with blue and gold tones on the wall
vertical garden installation on the upper wall
interior elevator with dark metal finish and gold accents

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator reveals a luxurious penthouse interior with plush red carpeting, modern reception furniture, and contemporary artwork. The space features high ceilings with recessed lighting and a living wall of greenery as the camera moves toward a second elevator.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass elevator descending through megabuilding with city views

events.description: elevator begins descending through the building shaft
viewing the cyberpunk cityscape through glass walls during descent

agents.ego_description: riding the glass elevator downward, observing the sprawling cyberpunk city through the transparent walls

entered.detail: transparent glass panels revealing the elevator shaft and exterior views
industrial steel girders lining the elevator shaft
panoramic view of the cyberpunk city with towering buildings and neon signs
glowing advertisements and billboards visible through the glass

segments.scene_description: Inside the glass elevator, the camera descends through the megabuilding while observing the cyberpunk cityscape outside. Metal support beams line the shaft as neon signs and distant skyscrapers become visible through the transparent walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty underground market with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: exiting elevator into dimly lit underground market area
turning corner through the market corridor past various stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded underground market, passing food vendors and neon-lit kiosks

notable_agents.action: vendor serving food at a brightly lit stall with green neon accents
person sitting on plastic chair near the market entrance

entered.detail: illuminated food counter with menu displays and serving area
tall digital display showing advertisements with pink and white graphics
industrial metal fencing and corrugated walls lining the corridor
illuminated billboards and posters on the market walls
metal barred gates leading to the upper street level

segments.scene_description: The elevator opens into a gritty underground market illuminated by neon lights and digital advertisements. Food vendors operate stalls along concrete corridors while metal grating lines the walls. The camera moves past NPCs browsing goods and sitting near the entrance gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city intersection with holographic advertisements and megabuildings

events.description: exiting underground market into bright open cyberpunk city street
crossing the red-paved street among pedestrians and futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy cyberpunk intersection, passing protesters and pedestrians while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: protester holding a sign reading 'THE END IS NEAR'
woman with bright red hair wearing green and black outfit walking past

entered.detail: large floating green holographic advertisement displaying product imagery
towering futuristic skyscrapers with stacked architecture and neon signage
distinctive red asphalt road with yellow crosswalk markings
trees growing in large blue concrete planters along the sidewalk
sleek black and white cars driving along the city street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underground market, the scene opens into a vast cyberpunk intersection bathed in hazy morning light and neon glow. Massive holographic billboards float above the red-paved streets while futuristic vehicles navigate the roads. The camera passes a protester with an apocalyptic sign and various pedestrians amidst the towering megabuildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sterile, luxury rooftop height into the gritty, neon-saturated depths of a futuristic city. It begins on a rooftop terrace with reflective glass and polished wooden decking, moving through a high-end penthouse interior characterized by plush red carpets and living greenery. As the camera enters a glass elevator, the perspective shifts to a descending view of the sprawling cityscape and metal support beams before opening into a gritty underground market filled with concrete corridors and glowing food stalls. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the subterranean tunnels into a vast intersection bathed in hazy morning light and neon glow. Finally, the view opens across red-paved streets featuring massive floating holographic billboards and futuristic vehicles navigating between towering megabuildings.
